Video.summary: December 19, 2023 - Welcome to The Orchard Cup - CHAMPIONSHIP NIGHT for season 2 of The Arizona Pickleball League! It's Tuesday Night Pickleball @ The Orchard, and tonight, the #1 seed Gilbert Gladiators (5-0) face the #2 seed Peoria Pythons (4-1).
Video.title: December 19, 2023 - Season 2 Championship - AZ PBL

Image.alt: December 19, 2023 - Season 2 Championship - AZ PBL
December 19, 2023 - Season 2 Championship - AZ PBL

Video.summary: A high-level pickleball match from the 2025 NCPA Utah Regional as the Utah Tech collegiate program's top two teams battle head-to-head. Filmed live at Club Pickleball USA in Orem, Utah, this episode features the Women's Doubles showdown between the #2 seed Utah Tech 1, featuring Lauren Mercado and Ella Boydston, against the #3 seed Utah Tech 2, anchored by NCPA commentator Dillon Champigny and rising star Mary Monson. Experience the intense collegiate format, which includes singles, doubles, and mixed doubles, a design optimized based on direct player feedback.
Video.title: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Tech1 vs. Utah Tech2

Image.alt: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Tech1 vs. Utah Tech2
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Tech1 vs. Utah Tech2
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Tech1 vs. Utah Tech2

Video.summary: Tuesday Night Pickleball heats up as the Surprise Stingers go head-to-head with the Scottsdale Scorchers at The Orchard @ Jigsaw Health. Expect fiery team chemistry, quick-paced exchanges, and a crowd-ready atmosphere in this Arizona Pickleball League showdown.

Video.summary: Catch the final showdown from the 2023 English Nationals as Mollie Kubrick-Finney and Thaddea Lock challenge reigning champs Antonella Giuliano and Pei Chun Kao. Featuring sharp angles, aggressive volleys, and expert analysis, this match crowns the best in British women’s doubles.
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 – Women’s Doubles Final – Giuliano & Kao vs Kubrick-Finney & Lock

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 – Women’s Doubles Final – Giuliano & Kao vs Kubrick-Finney & Lock
English Nationals 2023 – Women’s Doubles Final – Giuliano & Kao vs Kubrick-Finney & Lock
English Nationals 2023 – Women’s Doubles Final – Giuliano & Kao vs Kubrick-Finney & Lock

Video.summary: Watch as the formidable mother-daughter duo, Lee and Anna Leigh Waters, take on challengers from North Carolina in this Pro Women's Doubles match from the US National Pickleball Center. After an injury, it is great to see the champions partner up again, demonstrating the "fire and ice" style of play that has made them national champions. While the Waters team's game one was a quick 11-point victory, the challengers, Fuzesi and Maloof, handled themselves well on the championship court. The players at home can learn from Anna Leigh's "instigator" shots and two-handed backhand rolls, which she helped bring to the big stage.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Fuzesi/Maalouf

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Fuzesi/Maalouf
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Fuzesi/Maalouf
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Fuzesi/Maalouf

NPL - Drivers vs Bruisers (Womens)

Video.summary: We are live from the Barnes Tennis Center in San Diego, California, for Week 3 of the NCPA San Diego Regional 2025. This thrilling collegiate team match features Grand Canyon University (GCU) taking on the University of Hawaii. The broadcast picks up in the heat of the action during a crucial mixed doubles game, with GCU leading. Watch as the match extends into a dramatic Sudden Death Dreambreaker (Game 7) to decide the winner. The episode highlights the unique collegiate format where every point counts towards seeding for the National Championship. Key players include Hawaii's Tristan Simmons and Tama, battling against GCU's Tanner and Hannah. The match concludes with a high-stakes finish that determines who moves forward in bracket play.
Video.title: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - GCU vs. Hawaii

Image.alt: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - GCU vs. Hawaii
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - GCU vs. Hawaii
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - GCU vs. Hawaii

Video.summary: Get ready for an exciting Mixed Split Pro Age pickleball match featuring the formidable team of Jaime Oncins and Simone Jardim against the new pairing of Ryan Miscik and Christie Domoracki. Oncins is a former professional tennis player from Brazil. His partner, Simone Jardim, is a professional pickleball player, a Pickleball Hall of Fame inductee, and was once ranked the number one female player in the world. They face a new team with Ryan Miscik, a pro pickleball player and coach based in Venice, Florida. His partner, Christie Domoracki, is a player located in Boca Grande, Florida. This match brings together a mix of experienced pros and up-and-coming talent for a high-stakes competition on Florida's Paradise Coast.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Oncins/Jardim vs. Miscik/Domoracki

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Oncins/Jardim vs. Miscik/Domoracki
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Oncins/Jardim vs. Miscik/Domoracki
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Oncins/Jardim vs. Miscik/Domoracki

Video.summary: In this high-stakes Bronze Medal match at the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships, veteran competitors Jenny Klitch and Sheri Courter go head-to-head with Ellen Novoseletsky and Jenny Marcos. Expect calculated teamwork, steady hands, and sharp strategy as these seasoned senior pros compete for a podium finish. Filmed live from Naples, Florida, this match showcases the competitive spirit and skill that define senior pro pickleball.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Bronze – Klitch & Courter vs Novoseletsky & Marcos

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Bronze – Klitch & Courter vs Novoseletsky & Marcos
US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Bronze – Klitch & Courter vs Novoseletsky & Marcos
US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Bronze – Klitch & Courter vs Novoseletsky & Marcos

Video.summary: Jaime Oncins and Simone Jardim take on Lee Whitwell and Andrei Daescu in this Mixed Pro Split Age Gold Medal Match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Gold Medal Match

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Gold Medal Match
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Gold Medal Match
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Gold Medal Match

Video.summary: In this thrilling gold medal match from the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships, Dylan Frazier and Altaf Merchant take on defending champions Andrei Daescu and Dave Weinbach in the Men’s Split Pro Doubles division. The action heats up fast as Frazier and Merchant dominate early, only to be met with a fierce comeback from Daescu and Weinbach in game two. Momentum swings, net-cord drama, and tactical shifts lead to an electrifying third game where every point counts.From Frazier’s lightning-fast hands to Daescu’s towering net play, this match showcases elite shot-making, sharp strategy, and high emotion on Championship Court. With the crowd on edge and the gold medal on the line, it’s a true masterclass in professional pickleball.
Video.title: US Open 2024 – Men’s Split Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match – Frazier & Merchant vs Daescu & Weinbach

Image.alt: US Open 2024 – Men’s Split Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match – Frazier & Merchant vs Daescu & Weinbach
US Open 2024 – Men’s Split Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match – Frazier & Merchant vs Daescu & Weinbach
US Open 2024 – Men’s Split Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match – Frazier & Merchant vs Daescu & Weinbach

Video.summary: The 2025 European Pickleball Championships in Rome, Italy, concludes its first day with the historic Men's Singles Open Final under the floodlights. England's captain James Chaudry, the only active European player with a DUPR rating over 6.0, faces off against Poland's Bartosz Karbownik (referred to as Kabosnik/Kabashnik in audio).Chaudry dominates early with a mix of power and precise cross-court angles, taking the first game decisively. While Karbownik produces moments of brilliance, including a spectacular passing shot, he struggles with his footing on the clay surface. Witness Team England secure the gold medal in the inaugural singles event of the championships.
Video.title: Men's Singles Open Final - Chaudry vs. Karbownik

Image.alt: Men's Singles Open Final - Chaudry vs. Karbownik
Men's Singles Open Final - Chaudry vs. Karbownik
Men's Singles Open Final - Chaudry vs. Karbownik

Video.summary: In this Men’s Doubles Open Group C clash, Tom Turney and Sam Chajul take on Jamie Basford and Peter Hitchman. Watch as smart defense, aggressive drives, and well-timed net play define this intense showdown at the 2023 English Nationals. A standout match that reflects the growing depth of talent in British pickleball.
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Group C – Turney & Chajul vs Basford & Hitchman

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Group C – Turney & Chajul vs Basford & Hitchman
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Group C – Turney & Chajul vs Basford & Hitchman
